/usr/bin/ar qc libVulkanWindow.a CMakeFiles/VulkanWindow.dir/source/Application.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanWindow.dir/source/ImGuiManager.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanWindow.dir/source/VulkanDescriptors.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanWindow.dir/source/Swapchain.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanWindow.dir/source/UserInterface.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanWindow.dir/source/VulkanContext.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanWindow.dir/source/VulkanRenderer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanWindow.dir/source/VulkanResources.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanWindow.dir/source/VulkanUtils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanWindow.dir/source/Window.cpp.o CMakeFiles/VulkanWindow.dir/source/vma_impl.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libVulkanWindow.a
